Neural LabDocs

Neural Forecast Lab

See where a stock could be headed next.

This dashboard trains a TensorFlow model on real market data and macro signals like S&P 500 trend, VIX, treasury yields, and oil movement to forecast short-term stock direction.

Run a prediction to add symbols

How to Use the Lab

1. Forecast

Enter a ticker like AAPL and a horizon. This trains a neural network in real-time.

2. Track

Save your holdings to the Portfolio to see persistent P/L and quick-access predictions.

3. Analyze

Toggle RSI and EMA overlays on the chart for momentum and strength analysis.

4. Risk

Monitor portfolio volatility and model-predicted downside risk for your holdings.

Note: This is a neural research tool. Predictions are probabilistic and not financial advice.
